creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sergei Vyshenski from comment #0)

Hi,

Thanks for the diff. I have a question, when you say poudriere is not happy about this value, what do you mean exactly ? I tried on poudriere, and following warning is printed but that gets printed with commented LICENSE value too:

=======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
/!\ p5-Crypt-X509-0.52: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please set LICENSE for this port

So I'm not sure how that makes any difference.

Thanks!
